data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes choices to reduce the decision time for users.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design is optimized for ease of use by making interactive elements easily selectable.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: An aesthetically pleasing design is perceived to be easier to use.

data.title: Law of Common Region
data.description: Groups related elements together to create logical associations.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users prefer websites to work the same way as other sites they frequently visit.
data.technical_spec: Familiar Interface Patterns, Standard Web Conventions
